nodes.label: AmyOs [VIC]
nodes.description: Affiliated with @breakthewire as an artist and presenter, AmyOs sets have reportedly made 2 FBR cafe patrons wake up in Berlin with no memory of how they got there.

nodes.label: Clifford & SHUGA [AUS]
nodes.description: Remember that night I didn't come home? / CNC ONLINE / Recorded on December 13, 2024 / Featuring Clifford & SHUGA / [Speed garage, Wubs, Dubs] / ■ Clifford & SHUGA get the lab rowdy with unreleased speed garage and dub tracks, high-energy rhythms & deep bass-lines.

nodes.label: SPENG [SYD]
nodes.description: THE SPENG EFFECT / CNC004 / Recorded on 28 September 2024 / With SPENG aka Max aka SPENGLETRON 90000000000

nodes.label: Filter coffee
nodes.description: Filter coffee is brewed by pouring hot water over ground coffee, allowing it to drip through a paper or metal filter.

nodes.label: Giardiniera e Furikake
nodes.description: Daikon, Lotus root, Romanesco Cauliflower, White & Yellow Dutch Carrots, French and Watermelon radish brined over a long period to fully collaborate colours & flavours of each vegetable

nodes.label: Gnocchi Grandi Al Pesto
nodes.description: Handmade Gnocchi, Creamy Pesto made with home-grown Basil, Shaved Grana Padano and Cured egg yolk

nodes.label: HOTBABE93 [SYD]
nodes.description: Hotbabe93 played a vibrant set alongside the Chef's introduction of Focaccia to FBR café's set menu.

nodes.label: Il Tiramisu
nodes.description: Delicious Mascarpone cream layered with dark chocolate and Saviardi soaked in house-brewed espresso and Disaronno. Accompanied by a coffee agar plate and a dusting of coffee powder

nodes.label: Insalata Pomodoro
nodes.description: Home Grown Calabrese Oxheart Tomato and Basil, Confit garlic oil and Grana Padano w/ a dusting of dried oregano

nodes.label: Mehmet Alpodogan [DEK]
nodes.description: Fusing sounds from Paris to Sydney. Mehmet Alpdogan's sets echo diverse cities. Vibrant landscapes. House, Electro, Progressive, Acid, Techno.

nodes.label: La Sandwicchia
nodes.description: Paper thin San Danielle Prosciutto, Homemade Tapenade, Stracciatella, Rucola Piccalo, Shaved fennel dressed in Garlic oil engrossed in fresh Focaccia sourced locally

nodes.label: Tri Pane Spalmare
nodes.description: Fresh Focaccia w/ a selection of condimental spreads to complement and tease the following dishes.

nodes.label: Cuts n Cups
nodes.description: A recurring event series pairing live music sessions with guided coffee tastings, held at FBR Cafe.

nodes.label: FBR Cafe
nodes.description: A specialty coffee shop and gathering space in Sydney's inner west, where coffee meets culture.

nodes.label: FBR
nodes.description: A creative collective based in Sydney connecting communities through food, music, and people.

nodes.label: Omakase
nodes.description: The phrase omakase, literally 'I leave it up to you',[3] is most commonly used when dining at Japanese restaurants where the customer leaves it up to the chef to select and serve seasonal specialties

nodes.label: Bookings
nodes.description: Contact FBR for collaborations, events, and private bookings.
